audit_items.proof_trace: Both price paths enforce 18-decimal normalization. Data Streams prices are normalized in `transmit()` (L168-172) before storage in `s_dataStreamsPrice`, so `priceInfo.usdPrice` is always 18 decimals. The Data Feed fallback path (L394-400) normalizes the raw `answer` using live `decimals()` before returning. No code path returns a raw, un-normalized price.
